name: Hometown Romance
original_name: คุณแฟนบ้านนอก
overview:
"Love can change everything, and differences don’t matter at all — as long as the one thing you share is love."

A spoiled high-society princess who hates working is forced to live in the countryside with her down-to-earth, countryside fiancé — all in exchange for renewing the lease on her family’s prime real-estate, a challenge she must overcome to prove herself to her family.
